name: communications-suite
description: A complete AI communications toolkit for busy professionals. Triage and organize overflowing inboxes, draft professional emails in your voice, walk into every meeting prepared, extract action items from transcripts, build negotiation strategies on demand, and automatically sync your PLAUD voice recordings to your Cloud Brain. Designed to run as an Executive Inbox Agent on a daily schedule — so your communications are handled before you even open your laptop.

skills.name: comm-inbox-triage
skills.description: Triage a batch of emails into four urgency tiers, draft responses for critical items, and surface action items. The flagship skill for the Executive Inbox Agent.

skills.name: comm-email-drafter
skills.description: Draft professional emails for any situation — cold outreach, follow-ups, proposals, introductions, thank-yous, negotiation, and investor emails — written in your voice.

skills.name: comm-meeting-prep
skills.description: Pre-meeting intelligence brief with attendee research, agenda, talking points, objection handling, and a follow-up template.

skills.name: comm-meeting-transcript
skills.description: Process meeting recordings or transcripts — extract decisions, action items, follow-ups, and key insights. Your AI meeting analyst.

skills.name: comm-meeting-actions
skills.description: Paste meeting notes or a transcript and get structured action items, decisions made, follow-ups, and owner assignments extracted automatically.

skills.name: comm-negotiation-prep
skills.description: Full negotiation strategy — BATNA analysis, leverage identification, counterparty research, objection scripts, and a structured conversation flow.

skills.name: comm-imessage
skills.description: Send iMessages from your AI — text individuals or groups via BlueBubbles integration. Requires BlueBubbles MCP connector.

skills.name: comm-plaud-sync
skills.description: Automatically sync PLAUD voice recording summaries into your Cloud Brain — classified by domain, action items extracted, routed to the right place. Runs on a daily or weekly schedule. Requires the official Plaud MCP server (https://mcp.plaud.ai/mcp) and a PLAUD account.
